theme: Dark Mode Only - 'Architectural Finance / High-End Trading Terminal'. A fusion of luxury editorial layout and raw technological momentum.

fonts.name: Bodoni Moda
fonts.usage: Massive Hero text, Manifesto Chapter Numbers (e.g., '01', '02'), and huge editorial pull-quotes. Brings an unexpected high-fashion, luxury editorial feel to the finance space.

fonts.name: Azeret Mono
fonts.usage: Market tickers, live data, stats counters, overlines, and small utility tags. Brings the 'terminal/tech' aesthetic.

fonts.name: Manrope
fonts.usage: All paragraph text and standard UI labels. Clean, geometric, and highly readable.

rules: NO Inter or Space Grotesk allowed.
Headings (Bodoni Moda) must have tight tracking (tracking-tighter) and tight leading (leading-none).
Overlines (Azeret Mono) must be uppercase, tiny (text-xs or text-sm), and wide (tracking-[0.2em]).

accent.description: Electric Tangerine. A kinetic, non-purple signature color symbolizing untamed momentum and high-stakes trading. Used sparingly for critical CTAs, chart highlights, and the ticker up-trends.

rules: No generic full-screen gradients. Keep backgrounds solid or use subtle noise/grain textures.
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; use backdrop-blur-xl with bg-black/70 to ensure readability.
Ensure all text against dark backgrounds meets APCA contrast standards.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing & Tension. Use massive padding (py-32, py-40) between sections. Avoid symmetrical 'Bootstrap' centers; rely on asymmetrical Bento grids and left-aligned editorial flow.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use 12-column CSS grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) for the Manifesto and Services sections. Span elements unevenly (e.g., col-span-4 for a title, col-span-7 for body with an offset).

motion_and_interaction.scrolling: MANDATORY: Use '@studio-freight/react-lenis' for smooth, momentum-based scrolling. It makes the site feel premium and weighty.
motion_and_interaction.reveals: MANDATORY: Kinetic line-by-line masked reveals. For major headings, wrap each line in an overflow-hidden container, and animate the text upwards (y: '100%' to 0) using framer-motion.
motion_and_interaction.parallax: Use framer-motion (useScroll, useTransform) to create a subtle Y-axis parallax effect on the hero background image and the platform dashboard image.
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Buttons should have a magnetic hover effect or a sweeping background color fill. Hovering on service cards should slightly dim sibling cards.

hero_background.description: Dark aerial city skyline at night. Use with heavy black overlay (bg-black/60) and parallax scroll.

platform_preview.description: Glowing red/pink financial numbers on a dark screen. Use as a clipped, spotlighted feature image.
Laptop showing trading charts in the dark. Use for the dashboard mockup.

commodities_services.description: Stacked gold bars in the dark. Use for the Commodities/Forex service card.
Abstract curved architecture. Use for Indices/Momentum service card.

app_download.description: Hand holding a smartphone in the dark with a blue/bright glow. Perfect for the APK download section.

sections_breakdown.header: Glassmorphic top nav. Logo in Bodoni Moda (DHRUV TRADERS). Minimal links. 'Open Account' CTA button in solid #FF5500. MUST have background blur (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md) so content behind it doesn't clash.
sections_breakdown.hero: Massive Bodoni Moda text. Kinetic line-by-line reveal: 'MASTER', 'THE UNTAMED', 'MARKET'. Background is the dark city skyline with subtle parallax. A small 'Scroll to explore' indicator animated at the bottom.
sections_breakdown.marquee: Use 'react-fast-marquee'. A continuous, slow, border-top/bottom editorial ribbon displaying live currency pairs (EUR/USD, GBP/USD, XAU/USD, BTC/USD) in Azeret Mono font. Bright green for uptrend, #FF5500 for downtrend.
sections_breakdown.manifesto: Numbered chapters (01 Precision, 02 Discipline, etc.). Layout: Number (Bodoni Moda text-[15vw] text-zinc-800) in the background, overlapping with crisp white text. Asymmetrical arrangement.
sections_breakdown.services: Bento grid of instruments (Forex, Crypto, Commodities, Indices). Use the gold bars and abstract architecture images. Apply 'The Tracing Beam' or a 1px border hover effect (border-white/20) on cards.
sections_breakdown.platform_preview: A large editorial framing of the trading dashboard. Use the glowing numbers and laptop images. Add a 'floating' stats card overlapping the image via absolute positioning.
sections_breakdown.statistics: Massive counters (Azeret Mono) for Win Rate, Volume Traded, Active Traders. Use a layout that separates them with 1px vertical borders.
sections_breakdown.community_social: Massive brutalist blocks for YouTube, Telegram, and Facebook. Hovering expands a glowing #FF5500 border or arrow icon. Do not use standard small icons; make the typography the hero.
sections_breakdown.app_download: Split section: Left side is the smartphone image with a clipped frame. Right side is large typography 'TRADE ANYWHERE. ANYTIME.' with a bold 'Download APK' button.
sections_breakdown.footer: Massive Bodoni Moda 'DHRUV' spanning the entire width (text-[15vw]). Standard links, risk disclaimer in small text, copyright.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` to all buttons, links, and major interactive elements. E.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`, `data-testid='nav-login-link'`.

component_rules.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular. Primary CTAs use bg-[#FF5500] text-white. Secondary CTAs use transparent background with a 1px solid white border. Include arrow icons (Lucide/Phosphor) that animate x-axis on hover.
component_rules.cards: Cardless or sharp rectangles. No soft, muddy drop shadows. Use 1px inner borders (border-white/10) with solid dark backgrounds (bg-zinc-900).

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Prioritize motion and craft over everything else. The site must feel like an Awwwards winner.
Do not center-align everything. Use left-alignment for paragraphs and varied grid spans to create tension.

Use framer-motion for ALL scroll reveals. Wrap items in <motion.div> and use `whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`, `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}` with `viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}`.
No generic placeholder images. ONLY use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling at the root App level.
Add 'transition-all duration-300' to hover states (colors, borders), but NOT for transforms. Use framer-motion for transforms.
